IN DON GIAN NHAT CHO DIEN THOAI DUNG WEB

BUOC 1:
- Tren may tinh tai quay, double-click: IN_DIEN_THOAI_WEB_1_CLICK.bat
- Co the nhap IP may in moi neu can

BUOC 2:
- Gui link vua copy cho dien thoai
- Dien thoai mo link do, vao phieu va bam IN

XONG.

Luu y:
- Dien thoai va may tinh tai quay phai cung WiFi/LAN
- Khong tat cua so WEB PRINT BRIDGE khi dang in
